subject: Re: Resolution stuck
body:
Hi Mingyu,
You’re fitting too many parameter, your data likely aren’t strong enough to support this. 
Start with 1 temporal pose and fit only 1x1 image shift for a while - then add more and more parameters once resolution plateaus 
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Jun 15, 2025, at 00:35, Mingyu Jung <jmg0910@snu.ac.kr> wrote:
﻿Hi all,
I have a problem with improving resolution during M refinement. 
After subtomogram extraction in Warp and 3D refinement in Relion, I achieved 7.4 A and refine my particles with M.
Box size is 312. Image type is mrc with 10 fractions and temporal sampling for pose is 3.
At first I have a significant increase in resolution with pose, image warp (4 x 4), tilt angles and volume warp (3 x 3 x 2 x 10) refinement and achieved 6.7 A map.
However, tilt movie and CTF refinement did not improve the resolution. I used species with better than 6.7A as CTF refinement.
If you have any experience or suggestions regarding this issue, please let me know.
Best,
Mingyu
